title: 5-Acre Arabica Coffee Estate with Farmhouse
description: A fully operational Arabica estate with a charming 3BHK farmhouse, year-round stream, and stunning valley views. Income-generating with immediate possession.

title: Luxury 4BHK Villa with Infinity Pool
description: Architecturally designed villa overlooking the Cauvery valley with a private infinity pool, smart home automation, and a landscaped 1-acre garden. Ideal for homestay or personal retreat.

title: 12 Acres of Prime Agricultural Land
description: Contiguous 12-acre plot with river frontage, road access, and clear titles. Suitable for resort development, organic farming, or long-term land banking.
